ddls:
CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday or special event */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday or special event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday or special event */,
  "is_public_holiday" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the holiday is a public holiday */,
  "is_special_event" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the holiday is a special event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., main intersection, residential area) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "district" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "road_type" TEXT /* Type of road (e.g., highway, residential) */,
  "road_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the road (e.g., good, under construction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor or camera */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., camera, traffic counter) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Calibration status of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the weather data was collected */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., North, South) */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_transport_data" (
  "transport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public transport data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the public transport data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the public transport data was collected */,
  "bus_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of bus services (number of buses per hour) */,
  "train_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of train services (number of trains per hour) */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers using public transport */,
  "bike_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of bike services (number of bikes per hour) */,
  "bus_delay" INTEGER /* Average delay for bus services in minutes */,
  "train_delay" INTEGER /* Average delay for train services in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_transport_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "special_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each special event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the special event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the special event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the event is held */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., festival, parade) */,
  "expected_attendees" INTEGER /* Expected number of attendees */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Impact level on traffic (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_special_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., urban planner, traffic engineer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data or prediction */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic data entry being accessed */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic prediction entry being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data or prediction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "is_authenticated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user was authenticated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., City Traffic Control System) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source mapping */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the data is stored */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data synchronization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_mappings_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
